reason: Favorable resolution of major FUD (Mt. Gox code rewrite, Iran supply fears) strengthens Bitcoin's fundamental narrative, suggesting potential for upward momentum within a consolidation phase. However, ongoing altcoin weakness (XRP) and geopolitical instability warrant continued vigilance.
headlines: The 'stablecoin sandwich' is dead: Why the next phase of crypto payments is all about the user relationship
Crypto community fear of Iran choking oil supply and crashing markets may be overblown
Former Mt. Gox CEO proposed a rewrite of bitcoin's code to recover $5 billion in stolen funds. Gets quickly shutdown
Suspected insiders make over $1.2 million on Polymarket by betting on U.S.'s Iran strike
XRP tumbles 9% as break below $1.36 wipes out relief rally
